title: vicia aurantia
intro: Vicia aurantia, also known as the Orange Bird's Foot Trefoil, is a plant species within the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant has been found to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Vicia aurantia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
